title: Assistant language and intent distillation loop
scope: Feishu DC-Agent assistant short phrase protection, humane language tuning, and natural-language intent aliases.
acceptance_criteria: The system records safe short chitchat misses without capturing long business requests.
The distillation worker can generate pending candidates from chitchat miss logs and AI inbox feedback.
Candidates require human approval or rejection before changing runtime behavior.
Approved candidates can be applied into a hot-read override file for chitchat keywords, intent aliases, or tone templates.
The Feishu assistant runtime reads approved overrides without a restart for chitchat replies and keyword fallback routing.
Tests cover candidate generation, approval, application, rejection, and runtime hot-read behavior.
